infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The camera is used to capture hand positioning images for X-ray positioning training.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Access to photos is needed so you can select an existing hand positioning image for analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Captured positioning images may be saved to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Radiology Positioning Trainer to access your camera for capturing hand positioning images.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Radiology Positioning Trainer to access your photos to select positioning images for analysis.
